title: StrikeTeamUtils
description: A better way to handle Minecraft Teams 🫂
body:
# StrikeTeam Utils ``A better way to handle Minecraft Teams 🫂`` **StrikeTeamUtils** is a plugin made to help you handle scoreboard teams easier.
It allows you to teleport a whole team, enable glow, mass adding players to teams and much much more.

![StrikeTeamUtils Logo](https://i.imgur.com/zY7PV4M.png) ## Commands ❗ > The main command is **/tu** (teamutils), but you can use /teamutils & /teamu aswell 💡
_Notice! [parameter] means required, (parameter) means optional_ * **/tu create [TeamName] [Color]** - Creates a new team with these settings. ➕ * **/tu remove [TeamName]** - Removes a team. ➖ * **/tu addPlayer [TeamName] [Player]** - Adds a player to the team. * **/tu organizeplayers** - Add each online player to a random team 🎲 * **/tu addPlayer [TeamName] [Player]** - Add specific player to a specific team. 🙍‍♂️ * **/tu tpTeam [TeamName] [Player]** - Teleports a specific team to the player. 🔭
